observations: The meta banner at the top is present and legible, clearly communicating this is a RootSpec demo built from a seed file.
The Hierarchy Explorer section shows L3: Interactions is visually absent between L2: Truths and L4: Systems, suggesting a collapsed or missing level in the accordion display.
The Before vs. After comparison section renders correctly with two distinct panels, though at this zoom level the code content is quite small and may be hard to read without zooming.
The Spec Wizard section shows only the first step (mission) visible — it is unclear whether subsequent steps are accessible or if the wizard truncates below the fold.
All three screenshots are nearly identical full-page views with no visible differences, suggesting the test scenarios may not be capturing distinct interactive states.
